flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lees-McRae College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $33.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lees-McRae College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $33.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lees-McRae College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lees-McRae College fell 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.9k → $17.4k).
